title: sparganium ramosum var. conocarpum
intro: Sparganium ramosum var. conocarpum, also known as the bur-marigold or branched bur-reed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Sparganiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sparganium ramosum var. conocarpum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
